title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
